versions.version_description: Lee Brice - One Of Them Girls https://youtu.be/0sSuDWdymGQ.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Video used https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3fWvuFlMNOg&list=RDMM
[intro]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Are you one of them girls?[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]A[/ch]
That peels off the bud light label[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just might run a pool table[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]G[/ch]
Roll your eyes if I call you an angel[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Ain't you, one of them girls?[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
Asked you to dance, you say "No"[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just to see how far I'll go[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]G[/ch]
Your song comes on and your eyes closed[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
That's when I know, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
You got your heart on lockdown[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Got a wall, I gotta knock down[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G[/ch]
Kinda wanna do a shot now, come on now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]
And you're one of them girls that[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Ain't tryna meet nobody[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
You're just here for the party[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
If I'm wrong then stop me, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
You're one of them girls that[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
Ain't handin' out your number[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
You like to make us want you, you like to make us wonder[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
If you're one of them girls[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause I'm one of them boys[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
We'll trade this whole world, hmm, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
For one of them girls[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Who likes to act all quiet,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
Sexy not even tryin'[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, you know I ain't lyin', damn right[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
You one of them girls[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A[/ch]
Broke every heart in your hometown[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
On the day you rode out[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Got 'em all wishin' on stars now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
If I find one of them girls that[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Ain't tryna meet nobody[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
You're just here for the party[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
If I'm wrong then stop me, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
You're one of them girls that[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]
Ain't handin' out your number[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
You like to make us want you, you like to make us wonder[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
If you're one of them girls[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]
Well, I'm one of them boys[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
We'll trade this whole world, hmm, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
For one of them girls[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
You're one of them girls[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna put my lips on[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Hold all night long[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Write a little love song[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
For one of them girls that[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Ain't tryna meet nobody[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
You're just here for the party[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
If I'm wrong then stop me, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
You're one of them girls that[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]
Ain't handin' out your number[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
You like to make us want you, you like to make us wonder[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
If you're one of them girls[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause I'm one of them boys[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
We'll trade this whole world (This whole world)[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
For one of them girls[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Hmm, one of them girls[/tab]
